## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MessageCircleReply;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MessageCircleReply { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
comment, chat, conversation, dialog, feedback, speech bubble, reply, response

social
